languages.text: "Я приказы исполняю и воюю, куда скажут. С остальным пусть старшие командиры разбираются".

traits.locale_text: "Я приказы исполняю и воюю, куда скажут. С остальным пусть старшие командиры разбираются".

languages.text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."
languages.original_text: "Я приказы исполняю и воюю, куда скажут. С остальным пусть старшие командиры разбираются".

traits.locale_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."
"I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."
"I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

languages.text: “我只听命令，指哪打哪。其他事，自有高阶军官去操心。”
languages.original_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

traits.locale_text: “我只听命令，指哪打哪。其他事，自有高阶军官去操心。”

languages.text: « Je me contente d'obéir aux ordres et de me battre quand on me le demande. Je laisse les commandants en chef s'occuper du reste. »
languages.original_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

traits.locale_text: « Je me contente d'obéir aux ordres et de me battre quand on me le demande. Je laisse les commandants en chef s'occuper du reste. »

languages.text: "Ben emirlere uyarım, söylenen yerde savaşırım. Gerisiyle kıdemli komutanlar ilgilenir."
languages.original_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

traits.locale_text: "Ben emirlere uyarım, söylenen yerde savaşırım. Gerisiyle kıdemli komutanlar ilgilenir."

languages.text: «Sigo órdenes y lucho donde me ordenan. Los comandantes más veteranos se encargan de lo demás».
languages.original_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

traits.locale_text: «Sigo órdenes y lucho donde me ordenan. Los comandantes más veteranos se encargan de lo demás».

languages.text: "Ich befolge Befehle und kämpfe, wo es mir gesagt wird. Um den Rest kümmern sich die leitenden Commander."
languages.original_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

traits.locale_text: "Ich befolge Befehle und kämpfe, wo es mir gesagt wird. Um den Rest kümmern sich die leitenden Commander."

languages.text: 「命令に従って、指示された場所で戦う。残りは上級指揮官が処理する」
languages.original_text: "I follow orders and fight where I'm told. The senior commanders deal with the rest of it."

traits.locale_text: 「命令に従って、指示された場所で戦う。残りは上級指揮官が処理する」
